g.text: Blood Unit Recording and Expiration Sequence Diagrams
POST /blood-units (bloodType: ABO, rhFactor: Rh, donationDate: Date)
HTTP request body contains bloodType, rhFactor, donationDate
recordBloodUnit(bloodType: ABO, rhFactor: Rh, donationDate: Date)
Constructor validates invariants (date format, required fields)
Triggers expiration calculation for all blood units
Graceful skip - log error, do not proceed

a.title: missing
a.text: bloodType or rhFactor in stored record

g.text: calculateExpirationDate(donationDate: Date, bloodType: ABO, rhFactor: Rh) : Date [auth]
Fallback to predefined shelf life table (no system failure)
Automated trigger - same logic as manual
